heading: Resume a Cloud Deployment
body:
To resume an Atlas `M10+` cluster that you paused previously:**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo start a paused Atlas cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas clusters start <clusterName> [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters start](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-start).**Ui:**Atlas UIFor the cluster you want to pause, either:- Click , then click Resume Cluster, or

- Click Resume.> **Note:** If you don't resume an `M10+` cluster within 30 days, Atlas
> resumes the cluster.
